headline: Why Data Export Matters for Long-Running Cases
subtext: For lawyers, secure intake is only the beginning of the problem. A matter that starts with one sensitive disclosure may stay active through internal review, negotiation, regulatory contact, or litigation planning for a long time after the first message arrive…
